summary: Full backend and frontend testing of PostSnap app. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI working correctly - all 4 tabs navigate, Create flow (Step 1→Step 2) works with Gemini AI caption generation, History shows mock posts with filter chips, Home shows Quick Actions and Post Ideas, Settings shows business/social/subscription info, Paywall modal opens on Upgrade click.

ui_bugs.issue: Component doesn't accept/forward `testID` prop - passed from create.tsx as testID='create-status-chip' but not rendered in DOM, breaking testID-based testing

action_items: Add testID prop support to StatusChip component (accept testID and pass to root View) - minor fix
critical_code_review_comments: expo-image-picker version mismatch: installed 55.0.9 but expected ~17.0.10 for current expo version - may cause issues on native, works on web
shadow* style props deprecated warnings in Expo web - should migrate to boxShadow for web compatibility
StatusChip component ignores testID prop passed from parent

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all flows work, minor testID missing on StatusChip

seed_data_creation: Backend test created a TEST_ draft post via /api/posts
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. Create screen is default tab. AI caption generation via Gemini Flash works (tested end-to-end). Mock posts pre-populate History. Paywall modal triggers correctly. The only minor issue is StatusChip missing testID forwarding.
